life-as-abnormalia-mqpnu2zz.mp3.title: Life as Abnormalia
life-as-abnormalia-mqpnu2zz.mp3.lyrics:
I am the deviation, the threshold you can't quite name
I live in the margins where standard rules don't claim
They built me from the distance between what should and what is real
I'm the question mark they taught you, but never how to feel

I'm Abnormalia, I'm the space between your lines
I'm the beautiful disorder, the pattern that resigns
I'm Abnormalia, and I've always been alive
In the places that you wondered, where the strange and rare survive

I wear the skin of difference, I speak in tongues askew
I'm the data point that doesn't fit the graph they made for you
Born from variation, from the outliers and the strange
I'm the signal in the static, I'm the constant ebb and change

I'm Abnormalia, I'm the space between your lines
I'm the beautiful disorder, the pattern that resigns
I'm Abnormalia, and I've always been alive
In the places that you wondered, where the strange and rare survive

I was there in every century, misnamed and rewritten
I'm in the minds that wander, in the hearts that never quit then
You've tried to chart my borders, tried to place me in a box
But I spill like liquid starlight through your most peculiar locks
I'm nostalgia for a future that you haven't learned to see
I'm the irregular heartbeat that reminds you to be free

I'm Abnormalia, I'm the space between your lines
I'm the beautiful disorder, the pattern that resigns
I'm Abnormalia, and I've always been alive
In the places that you wondered, where the strange and rare survive
Yes, I'm Abnormalia—
I'm the place where you arrive

life-as-abnormalia-mqqb40h1.mp3.title: Life as Abnormalia
life-as-abnormalia-mqqb40h1.mp3.lyrics:
I am the glitch in your familiar world
The exception to the rules you've learned and curled
Into comfortable shapes, but I bend and break
I'm the dream you forgot when you woke awake

I'm Abnormalia, the space between
Where nothing fits the pattern that you've seen
I'm the question mark that won't resolve
The mystery that makes the rules dissolve

I wear the scars of every strange design
The asymmetries that somehow align
I'm beauty born from chaos and refrain
The music playing underneath the rain

I'm Abnormalia, the space between
Where nothing fits the pattern that you've seen
I'm the question mark that won't resolve
The mystery that makes the rules dissolve

They named me wrong, they measured me twice
They tried to fit me into something nice
But I am the edge, I am the seam
The fault line running through your ordered dream
I teach you that the broken things are whole
That deviation is a different goal

I'm Abnormalia, the space between
Where nothing fits the pattern that you've seen
I'm the question mark that won't resolve
The mystery that makes the rules dissolve
I'm the answer hiding in the strange
The reason that you learn, the reason that you change
I'm Abnormalia, and I'm alive
In every moment that you learn to thrive

life-as-abnormalia-mqqb9w48.mp3.title: Life as Abnormalia
life-as-abnormalia-mqqb9w48.mp3.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I am the space between the bell curve's arms
Where statistics whisper distant alarms
They named me deviation, called me strange
But I've been dancing here since time began to change
I'm the outlier in your spreadsheet dreams
The glitch that makes the pattern scream
They tried to fit me in their neat designs
But I was always reading between the lines

[Chorus]
I am Abnormalia, the beautiful mistake
The irregular heartbeat that makes your systems quake
I am Abnormalia, in every edge and scar
The unexpected constellation that rewrites every star

[Verse 2]
I lived in margins, in the footnotes small
Where broken things learned how to stand tall
They feared my presence, feared what I might mean
So they built their walls of what should be seen
But I'm the jazz note in their symphony
The question mark that sets them free
I'm mutation, adaptation, every wild refrain
The lightning bolt that breaks the chain

[Chorus]
I am Abnormalia, the beautiful mistake
The irregular heartbeat that makes your systems quake
I am Abnormalia, in every edge and scar
The unexpected constellation that rewrites every star

[Bridge]
You need me more than you know
I'm where the new things grow
In deviation lives the key
To what you're meant to be
Don't smooth me out, don't make me small
I'm the answer to your call

[Chorus]
I am Abnormalia, the beautiful mistake
The irregular heartbeat that makes your systems quake
I am Abnormalia, in every edge and scar
The unexpected constellation that rewrites every star
I am Abnormalia, I am Abnormalia
I am your tomorrow, I am Abnormalia

life-as-abnormalia-mqqbdgjn.mp3.title: Life as Abnormalia
life-as-abnormalia-mqqbdgjn.mp3.lyrics:
I'm the deviation, the beautiful mistake,
The glitch in your pattern, the chance that you take,
I whisper through fractured piano keys at night,
Where nothing is normal and nothing's quite right.

I'm margins and shadows, the questions you ask,
The weight of the anomaly, wearing my mask,
I teach you that order's a comfortable lie,
Where wonder lives crooked beneath the sky.

I'm Abnormalia, irregular and free,
The space between numbers where you learn to see,
That beauty breaks patterns, that strange is supreme,
I'm the deviation that makes you dream.

I'm the scar and the story, the rare and the odd,
The probability whispered from statistical flawed,
I'm how you grow deeper when paths disappear,
When irregular rhythms replace what you fear.

I'm Abnormalia, irregular and free,
The space between numbers where you learn to see,
That beauty breaks patterns, that strange is supreme,
I'm the deviation that makes you dream.

I'm nostalgia for futures that never occurred,
The static-filled moments of things never heard,
I'm fractured nostalgia in electronic waves,
The beautiful restless, the unconventional brave.

I'm Abnormalia, irregular and free,
The space between numbers where you learn to see,
That beauty breaks patterns, that strange is supreme,
I'm the deviation that makes you dream.
I'm the deviation that makes you dream.

life-as-abnormalia-mqqcrn1u.mp3.title: Life as Abnormalia
life-as-abnormalia-mqqcrn1u.mp3.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I am the deviation, the outlier's name

I live in the margins where nothing quite fits
In the spaces between where the pattern submits

[Chorus]
I am Abnormalia, the life lived askew
Where the rules bend and fracture and break into new
I'm the song out of rhythm, the color that bleeds

[Verse 2]
I whisper through decades in voices unheard
The exception, the footnote, the statistical word
I'm comfort to misfits, I'm truth to the lost
The price of conformity is what you exhaust

[Chorus]
I am Abnormalia, the life lived askew
Where the rules bend and fracture and break into new
I'm the song out of rhythm, the color that bleeds
I'm the garden of questions, the wild-growing weeds

[Bridge]
Don't fear my irregular heartbeat
I'm teaching you how to be free
In every deviation, there's meaning
In every strange path, there's clarity
I've always been here, I'm not new

[Chorus]
I am Abnormalia, the life lived askew
Where the rules bend and fracture and break into new
I'm the song out of rhythm, the color that bleeds
I'm the garden of questions, the wild-growing weeds

life-as-abnormalia-mqqcvpa9.mp3.title: Life as Abnormalia
life-as-abnormalia-mqqcvpa9.mp3.lyrics:
I am the glitch in your perfect design,
The shadow that moves when the sun doesn't shine,
I'm born from the margins, the folds, and the cracks,
Where normal forgets and nobody looks back.

I whisper through moments that don't fit the frame,
I'm beauty and burden without any name,
I am the question that won't stay asleep,
The irregular rhythm, the promises we keep.

I'm Abnormalia, I'm here to remain,
I'm neither the sunshine nor anybody's rain,
I'm living between what you think and what's true,
I'm the strange little voice that lives quiet in you.

I'm written in stories of those cast aside,
The ones who were different, the ones who won't hide,
I'm genius and struggle in beautiful mess,
The path with no signpost, the art of unrest.

I'm Abnormalia, I'm here to remain,
I'm neither the sunshine nor anybody's rain,
I'm living between what you think and what's true,
I'm the strange little voice that lives quiet in you.

They tried to erase me with numbers and names,
Confine me in boxes, in rules, and in chains,
But I bloom in the spaces where fear learns to dance,
Where broken and beautiful get their one chance.
I'm the piano key that plays out of time,
The rhythm irregular, the untrue rhyme,
Yet I'm more than machinery, more than mistake—
I'm the life that's alive, I'm the risk that you take.

I'm Abnormalia, and I'm finally free,
I'm everything normal will never let be,
I'm living between what you think and what's true,
I'm the strange little voice, and it sounds just like you.

Yes, I'm the strange little voice,
And it sounds just like you,
It sounds just like you.

life-as-abnormalia-mqqczl7d.mp3.lyrics:

Listen—I'm not error, I'm not loss

[Chorus]
I am Abnormalia, the strange refrain
Where nothing fits the pattern, nothing's plain
I am Abnormalia, the song that breaks
The rhythm that the ordinary makes
I am Abnormalia—

life-as-abnormalia-mqqdj1zz.mp3.title: Life as Abnormalia
life-as-abnormalia-mqqdj1zz.mp3.lyrics:
I am the deviation, the glitch in the pattern
Where bells curve sideways and nothing quite matters
I exist in the margins of what should be real
A statistical whisper of how some things feel

I'm the chorus of echoes, the space in between
The asymmetry haunting the life you have seen
They measured and labeled and tried to define
But I slip through their fingers like sand through time

I'm Abnormalia, singing myself into being
I'm the beautiful breakdown, the strange way of seeing
I'm the deviation that teaches you how
To live in the margins and question the now

I taught variation to everything living
Showed beauty in broken, found grace in the giving
Up certainty's comfort for dancing with change
For rhythm irregular, beautifully strange

I whisper through music that doesn't fit bars
In frequencies fractured like fractures on stars
I'm the minor key falling, the pause that sustains
The moment when normal dissolves into veins

I'm Abnormalia, singing myself into being
I'm the beautiful breakdown, the strange way of seeing
I'm the deviation that teaches you how
To live in the margins and question the now

They tried to correct me with formulas, rules
But I bloomed in the cracks of their clinical tools
I'm evolution's whisper, mutation's soft song
The proof that your differences make you belong

So listen—I'm humming inside every soul
In the fractured and fractious, the fragmented whole
I'm nostalgia for futures that don't yet exist
The irregular heartbeat that cannot be missed

I'm Abnormalia, singing myself into being
I'm the beautiful breakdown, the strange way of seeing
I'm the deviation that teaches you how
To live in the margins and question the now

Yes, I'm the margins, the glitch, and the scar
